'''âv-m-z-w''' ('''kavamzewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:anecdotalize|anecdotalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-m-z-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:anecdotalize|anecdotalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-m-z-w
|-
! Lemma
| kavamzewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivamzewoko|thivamzewoko]] || [[word:jivamzewoko|jivamzewoko]] || [[word:shivamzewoko|shivamzewoko]] || [[word:kivamzewoko|kivamzewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvamzewoko|thuthuvamzewoko]] || [[word:jujuvamzewoko|jujuvamzewoko]] || [[word:shushuvamzewoko|shushuvamzewoko]] || [[word:kukuvamzewoko|kukuvamzewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvamzewoko|thuvamzewoko]] || [[word:juvamzewoko|juvamzewoko]] || [[word:shuvamzewoko|shuvamzewoko]] || [[word:kuvamzewoko|kuvamzewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvamzewoko|thuvamzewoko]] || [[word:juvamzewoko|juvamzewoko]] || [[word:shuvamzewoko|shuvamzewoko]] || [[word:kuvamzewoko|kuvamzewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevamzewoko|thevamzewoko]] || [[word:jevamzewoko|jevamzewoko]] || [[word:shevamzewoko|shevamzewoko]] || [[word:kevamzewoko|kevamzewoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovamzewoko|thovamzewoko]] || [[word:jovamzewoko|jovamzewoko]] || [[word:shovamzewoko|shovamzewoko]] || [[word:kovamzewoko|kovamzewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovamzewoko|thovamzewoko]] || [[word:jovamzewoko|jovamzewoko]] || [[word:shovamzewoko|shovamzewoko]] || [[word:kovamzewoko|kovamzewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvamzewoko|thĂŠvamzewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvamzewoko|jĂŠvamzewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvamzewoko|shĂŠvamzewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvamzewoko|kĂŠvamzewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavamzewoko|thathavamzewoko]] || [[word:jajavamzewoko|jajavamzewoko]] || [[word:shashavamzewoko|shashavamzewoko]] || [[word:kakavamzewoko|kakavamzewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavamzewoko|thavamzewoko]] || [[word:javamzewoko|javamzewoko]] || [[word:shavamzewoko|shavamzewoko]] || [[word:kavamzewoko|kavamzewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavamzewoko|thavamzewoko]] || [[word:javamzewoko|javamzewoko]] || [[word:shavamzewoko|shavamzewoko]] || [[word:kavamzewoko|kavamzewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
